contracts.objective: Ratify bounded development contracts and the vertical roadmap before further material implementation.
contracts.success_condition: The contract validator and its unit tests pass and the roadmap supersedes stale next-action guidance.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop after contract, roadmap and reuse-governance files are complete; do not implement SDMX, versioning or telemetry in this pull request.
contracts.fallback_condition: If an existing file conflicts with a ratified constitutional rule, preserve the constitutional rule and record the conflict in the decision log.

contracts.objective: Make pyproject.toml the sole authored project version and fail CI on divergent generated values.
invariants: no manually maintained second version constant
generated reports identify the installed version
contracts.success_condition: A clean install reports the pyproject version and CI rejects a deliberately altered config or generated version.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop after version derivation and consistency tests pass; do not bump to 0.8.6 until every v0.8.6 gate is complete.
contracts.fallback_condition: In an uninstalled source checkout, report 0+unknown only for diagnostic display and never for release artefacts.

contracts.objective: Select one SDMX client for the v0.8.7 Eurostat and OECD pilot using recorded evidence.
invariants: live network is excluded from PR checks
raw bytes and hashes remain Armilar-controlled
pysdmx is not installed without a demonstrated gap
contracts.success_condition: sdmx1 retrieves and parses representative Eurostat and OECD responses with sufficient metadata, or a specific unmet requirement justifies a bounded pysdmx comparison.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop after the declared requirement matrix is evaluated; do not build the full v0.8.7 series.
contracts.fallback_condition: Preserve the current replay contract and classify the spike as blocked without enabling live production.

contracts.objective: Use Hypothesis to test economic and mathematical invariants over generated edge cases.
contracts.success_condition: Properties cover sums, ordering, duplicate rejection, future periods, FX conventions, incomplete grids and silent-renormalisation prevention within bounded CI runtime.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop after the declared properties pass; do not add model-performance tests or new economic methods.
contracts.fallback_condition: Where a public function cannot be tested without redesign, retain deterministic cases and record the testability gap instead of refactoring broadly.
acceptance_tests: seeded reproduction of one deliberate failure during development

contracts.objective: Publish reproducible codebase and pipeline telemetry without treating code volume as progress.
invariants: generated telemetry is deterministic for a checkout
generated files do not enter public/latest in PRs
missing optional pipeline outputs are explicit
contracts.success_condition: CI publishes production LOC, test LOC, tests, suite duration, modules, largest file, pipeline runtime, artefact count and available weight/price coverage.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop after telemetry generation and CI upload work; do not introduce an observability platform.
contracts.fallback_condition: Emit null plus an explicit reason for unavailable economic coverage metrics rather than fabricate zero.

contracts.objective: Produce the first real replayable monthly Armilar research series for a fixed Eurostat universe.
contracts.success_condition: The declared historical series can be rebuilt from exact hashed official bytes and every observation has provenance.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop before OECD expansion, new countries or backtest model development.
contracts.fallback_condition: Reduce the declared universe or common interval explicitly before acquisition; never drop cells during monthly calculation.

contracts.objective: Measure whether category-level Armilar construction improves on simpler baselines and identify the three largest error sources.
invariants: same evaluation sample for compared models
no gate chosen after seeing results
contracts.success_condition: B0-B3 are compared on a common publication-aware sample and the top three measured error sources are reported quantitatively.
contracts.stop_condition: Stop before adding complex nowcast models or broad source expansion.
contracts.fallback_condition: If vintage data are insufficient, publish the limitation and run only defensible subperiods rather than reconstruct unavailable knowledge.
